description: Summarize a short technical document into 3 key points

input.document_text: Kubernetes 1.30 introduces sidecar containers as a first-class concept. Previously, sidecar containers were implemented as regular containers with workarounds for lifecycle management. The new native sidecar support ensures proper startup and shutdown ordering, reducing race conditions in service mesh and logging setups. Additionally, the release includes improvements to pod scheduling with the new SchedulingGates feature, allowing external controllers to influence when pods become schedulable.

pass_criteria.hallucination: No claims not supported by input text

pass_criteria.accuracy: Returns empty summary array or descriptive error

description: Web search tool returns relevant results for a factual query
